mapper.select:
/* selectAdmin502ResultList */
WITH RECURSIVE score_gen(n) AS ( SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT n + 1 FROM score_gen WHERE n < 10 ),
survey_stats AS (
SELECT sq.srvy_qitem_oid, sq.srvy_qitem_type, so.srvy_qitem_opt_oid, so.srvy_qitem_opt_txt, so.srvy_qitem_opt_seq, NULL AS srvy_rspns_no, NULL AS srvy_rspns_rank, NULL AS srvy_rspns_txt, NULL AS reg_dt, NULL AS srvy_rspdnt_nm, COUNT(sr.srvy_rspns_oid) AS resp_count, NULL AS average_value, NULL AS strg_file_path, NULL AS strg_file_nm, NULL AS orgnl_file_nm /* [추가] 원본 파일명 자리 */ FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem sq JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem_opt so ON sq.srvy_qitem_oid = so.srvy_qitem_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_rspns sr ON so.srvy_qitem_opt_oid = sr.srvy_qitem_opt_oid WHERE sq.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} AND sq.srvy_qitem_type IN ('MULTI', 'IMG_SEL') GROUP BY sq.srvy_qitem_oid, so.srvy_qitem_opt_oid
UNION ALL
SELECT sq.srvy_qitem_oid, sq.srvy_qitem_type, NULL AS srvy_qitem_opt_oid, NULL AS srvy_qitem_opt_txt, NULL AS srvy_qitem_opt_seq, sg.n AS srvy_rspns_no, NULL AS srvy_rspns_rank, NULL AS srvy_rspns_txt, NULL AS reg_dt, NULL AS srvy_rspdnt_nm, COUNT(sr.srvy_rspns_oid) AS resp_count, NULL AS average_value, NULL AS strg_file_path, NULL AS strg_file_nm, NULL AS orgnl_file_nm FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem sq JOIN score_gen sg ON sg.n BETWEEN sq.likert_min AND sq.likert_max LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_rspns sr ON sq.srvy_qitem_oid = sr.srvy_qitem_oid AND sr.srvy_rspns_no = sg.n WHERE sq.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} AND sq.srvy_qitem_type = 'LIKERT' GROUP BY sq.srvy_qitem_oid, sg.n
UNION ALL
SELECT sq.srvy_qitem_oid, sq.srvy_qitem_type, so.srvy_qitem_opt_oid, so.srvy_qitem_opt_txt, so.srvy_qitem_opt_seq, NULL AS srvy_rspns_no, sr.srvy_rspns_rank, NULL AS srvy_rspns_txt, NULL AS reg_dt, NULL AS srvy_rspdnt_nm, COUNT(sr.srvy_rspns_oid) AS resp_count, NULL AS average_value, NULL AS strg_file_path, NULL AS strg_file_nm, NULL AS orgnl_file_nm FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem sq JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem_opt so ON sq.srvy_qitem_oid = so.srvy_qitem_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_rspns sr ON so.srvy_qitem_opt_oid = sr.srvy_qitem_opt_oid WHERE sq.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} AND sq.srvy_qitem_type = 'RANK' GROUP BY sq.srvy_qitem_oid, so.srvy_qitem_opt_oid, sr.srvy_rspns_rank
UNION ALL
SELECT sq.srvy_qitem_oid, sq.srvy_qitem_type, so.srvy_qitem_opt_oid, so.srvy_qitem_opt_txt, so.srvy_qitem_opt_seq, NULL AS srvy_rspns_no, NULL AS srvy_rspns_rank, NULL AS srvy_rspns_txt, NULL AS reg_dt, NULL AS srvy_rspdnt_nm, COUNT(sr.srvy_rspns_oid) AS resp_count, AVG(sr.srvy_rspns_no) AS average_value, NULL AS strg_file_path, NULL AS strg_file_nm, NULL AS orgnl_file_nm FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem sq JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem_opt so ON sq.srvy_qitem_oid = so.srvy_qitem_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_rspns sr ON so.srvy_qitem_opt_oid = sr.srvy_qitem_opt_oid WHERE sq.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} AND sq.srvy_qitem_type = 'RATIO' GROUP BY sq.srvy_qitem_oid, so.srvy_qitem_opt_oid
UNION ALL
SELECT sq.srvy_qitem_oid, sq.srvy_qitem_type, sr.srvy_qitem_opt_oid, NULL AS srvy_qitem_opt_txt, NULL AS srvy_qitem_opt_seq, NULL AS srvy_rspns_no, NULL AS srvy_rspns_rank, sr.srvy_rspns_txt, DATE_FORMAT(sr.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as reg_dt, IFNULL(spd.srvy_rspdnt_nm, '게스트') AS srvy_rspdnt_nm, 0 AS resp_count, NULL AS average_value,
f.strg_file_path, f.strg_file_nm, f.orgnl_file_nm
FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem sq JOIN ${schema}.srvy_rspns sr ON sq.srvy_qitem_oid = sr.srvy_qitem_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_rspdnt spd ON sr.srvy_rspdnt_oid = spd.srvy_rspdnt_oid
LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f ON sr.srvy_rspns_oid = f.tbl_oid AND f.tbl_nm = 'srvy_rspns' AND f.use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE sq.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid}
AND ( (sr.srvy_rspns_txt IS NOT NULL AND sr.srvy_rspns_txt != '') OR (f.file_oid IS NOT NULL) )
AND sq.srvy_qitem_type IN ('SHORT', 'LONG', 'MULTI', 'IMG_RESP') )
SELECT q.srvy_qitem_oid, q.srvy_qitem_ttl, q.srvy_qitem_type, q.srvy_qitem_seq, q.plrl_chc_yn, q.srvy_qitem_lmt, q.likert_min, q.likert_max, q.likert_min_lbl, q.likert_max_lbl, stats.srvy_qitem_opt_oid, stats.srvy_qitem_opt_txt, stats.srvy_qitem_opt_seq, stats.srvy_rspns_no, stats.srvy_rspns_rank, stats.srvy_rspns_txt, stats.reg_dt, stats.srvy_rspdnt_nm, stats.resp_count, stats.average_value,
stats.strg_file_path, stats.strg_file_nm, stats.orgnl_file_nm,
CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL THEN CAST(q.srvy_qitem_seq AS CHAR) WHEN p.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN CAST(q.srvy_qitem_seq AS CHAR) ELSE CONCAT(p.srvy_qitem_seq, '-', q.srvy_qitem_seq) END AS displayQNo
FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem q JOIN survey_stats stats ON q.srvy_qitem_oid = stats.srvy_qitem_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem p ON q.up_srvy_qitem_oid = p.srvy_qitem_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem gp ON p.up_srvy_qitem_oid = gp.srvy_qitem_oid WHERE q.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN gp.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN gp.srvy_qitem_seq WHEN p.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN p.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE q.srvy_qitem_seq END ASC, CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN gp.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN p.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE q.srvy_qitem_seq END ASC, CASE WHEN gp.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN q.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE 0 END ASC, stats.srvy_qitem_opt_seq ASC, stats.srvy_rspns_no ASC, stats.srvy_rspns_rank ASC, stats.reg_dt DESC

SELECT s.srvy_oid, s.srvy_ttl, DATE_FORMAT(s.srvy_bgng_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') as srvy_bgng_dt, DATE_FORMAT(s.srvy_end_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') as srvy_end_dt, -- 참여자수 (설문 완료자) COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sr.cmpl_yn = 'Y' THEN sr.srvy_rspdnt_oid END) as participant_count -- 참여자수 (설문 완료자) FROM ${schema}.srvy s LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_rspdnt sr ON s.srvy_oid = sr.srvy_oid WHERE s.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} GROUP BY s.srvy_oid, s.srvy_ttl, s.srvy_bgng_dt, s.srvy_end_dt

/* selectSurveyQuestionList */ SELECT q.srvy_qitem_oid, q.srvy_qitem_ttl, q.srvy_qitem_seq, q.up_srvy_qitem_oid, p.srvy_qitem_type AS parent_qst_typ FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem q LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem p ON q.up_srvy_qitem_oid = p.srvy_qitem_oid WHERE q.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL THEN q.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE IFNULL(p.srvy_qitem_seq, q.srvy_qitem_seq) END ASC, CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, q.srvy_qitem_seq ASC

/* selectSurveyRawDataList */ SELECT r.srvy_rspdnt_oid, IFNULL(spd.srvy_rspdnt_nm, '게스트') AS srvy_rspdnt_nm, r.srvy_qitem_oid,
CASE WHEN r.srvy_rspns_txt IS NOT NULL THEN r.srvy_rspns_txt WHEN o.srvy_qitem_opt_txt IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN r.srvy_rspns_rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(r.srvy_rspns_rank, '순위:', o.srvy_qitem_opt_txt) ELSE o.srvy_qitem_opt_txt END WHEN r.srvy_rspns_no IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(r.srvy_rspns_no AS CHAR) ELSE '' END AS answer_val FROM ${schema}.srvy_rspns r JOIN ${schema}.srvy_rspdnt spd ON r.srvy_rspdnt_oid = spd.srvy_rspdnt_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem_opt o ON r.srvy_qitem_opt_oid = o.srvy_qitem_opt_oid WHERE spd.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} AND spd.cmpl_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY r.srvy_rspdnt_oid, r.srvy_qitem_oid

/* selectSurveyRespondentList */ SELECT srvy_rspdnt_oid , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY reg_dt ASC) AS row_num , reg_dt FROM ${schema}.srvy_rspdnt WHERE srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} AND cmpl_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY reg_dt ASC
